item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Craig McRae pushed to admit Nick Daicos mistake after Collingwood’s loss to Adelaide: ‘That’s real’
item.description: The premiership coach tried his best to avoid saying it as he also conceded a ‘connection breakdown’ within his team.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Trump raises glaring question about Iran’s new supreme leader
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Dramatic manhunt for alleged killer unfolds ahead of third round at The Players Championship
item.description: Players and fans arrived just as police were closing in on the suspect after an overnight chase.

item.title: The best family cars under $80,000... that aren't SUVs
item.description: Sure, some families need an SUV. But for a lot of new-car buyers, there are plenty of suitable alternatives. Here are just a few.

item.title: Dead man and seriously injured woman found inside home in Wellington, NSW
item.description: Another man has been charged with murder following the grisly discovery.

item.title: Formula 1 races in Bahrain and Saudi Arabia cancelled: ‘Incredibly important’
item.description: The official announcement has left a cloud over the 2026 season.

item.title: Australia’s fuel stockpile topped up as minister says supply secure
item.description: Demand for fuel has exploded across the country as war in the Middle East impacts global supply.

item.title: Motorhead guitarist Phil Campbell dies aged 64 following ‘major operation’
item.description: The star had been forced to cancel a tour of Australia this month due to ill-health.

item.title: Aussie teen sensation Daniel Williams in elite company after epic 0.01 victory in the 800m at Adelaide Invitational
item.description: ‘I can’t believe it, I actually can’t believe it. It’s insane, I’m stoked.’

item.title: 7NEWS Kiss and Kill: Anthony Eriksen fights 26-year sentence over Lisa Fenwick’s murder, claims he was sleepwalking
item.description: Lisa Fenwick was found on the bedroom floor of her apartment with dozens of stab wounds.

item.title: Underage Roblox accounts sold online allow predators to bypass safety measures protecting young gamers
item.description: One alleged Australian predator user has been charged with 596 child abuse-related offences.

item.title: Man killed in early-morning crash on Oxley Highway near Tamworth Airport in NSW
item.description: He was rushed to hospital after the crash but later died.

item.title: Body found in search for 77-year-old pilot after helicopter crash in northern NSW
item.description: The helicopter left the Gold Coast bound for Mudgee but failed to arrive as scheduled.

item.title: Former NRL star Chris Walker arrested after being found ‘hiding in a backyard’
item.description: The 46-year-old was brought into police custody on Saturday night.

item.title: Hundreds infected with norovirus on Star Princess cruise in the Caribbean
item.description: Almost one in 10 people aboard the cruise in the Caribbean fell ill.

item.title: How did we get here? The long, dark road to the ‘third Gulf War’
item.description: While attacks between US-Israeli forces and Iran may appear sudden, the crisis has been building for decades.

item.title: Scott Pendlebury learns fate for high bump live on air in expert commentary debut for Channel 7
item.description: The Collingwood champion was told of the decision while commentating for Channel 7.

item.title: New Port Adelaide coach Josh Carr begins career with a loss as North Melbourne begin season with hope
item.description: The Kangaroos faithful proved they have a long memory in their season-opening win.

item.title: Young woman dead, man fighting for life after fall on wet Mount Beerwah trail on Queensland’s Sunshine Coast
item.description: Police said the fall happened after light rain made the terrain ‘extremely slippery’.

item.title: Dennis Cometti: Family of footy broadcasting icon ‘truly grateful & touched’ at outpouring of love and support
item.description: The family of Dennis Cometti say the broadcasting legend would be “humbled and amazed” by the wide-ranging and heartfelt tributes from the footy world following his death earlier this month.

item.title: NRL 2026: Kalyn Ponga, Dylan Brown injured as Newcastle Knights defeat Manly Sea Eagles
item.description: The Sea Eagles have plenty of soul-searching to do after failing to capitalise on a horror injury toll for a resurgent Newcastle.

item.title: Nasiah Wanganeen-Milera inexplicably benched at crucial moment as Melbourne sink St Kilda
item.description: ‘It is one of the most bizarre things I’ve ever seen. There is no explanation.’

item.title: Oscar Piastri and Lando Norris fail to start at Chinese Grand Prix as Kimi Antonell fulfills F1 dream
item.description: The Australian and his McLaren teammate were both removed from grid just before lights out.

item.title: Kiss and Kill: Sleepwalking murderer Anthony Eriksen thought to be vulnerable narcissist
item.description: Former friends describe a controlling manipulator who believed he was 'too good' for everything.

item.title: US flag flies over Venezuela for first time since 2019, two months after capture of President Nicolas Maduro
item.description: ‘This is positive; this is another step.’

item.title: Allegedly drunk driver crashes into six cars including one with baby inside in Sydney’s north
item.description: ‘I thought she was actually going to get crushed in that instant, which was terrifying’.

item.title: New laws to crack down on dodgy real estate agents underquoting
item.description: The days of underquoting to generate interest could soon be over.

item.title: Punch the monkey is finally making friends and fitting in
item.description: ‘Now he’s communicating with other monkeys and it’s great to see him reaching those milestones.’
